benchmark_design.kernel_microbench: Optional synthetic operator benchmark. Keep it separate from end-to-end workload results.
benchmark_design.shared_backbone_runtime: Grouped LoRA runtime under the currently launched topology. On torchrun this is the DDP-style path; use it for raw profiling, not as the headline paper-style speedup unless the topology and batch-sizing policy match the baseline suite.
benchmark_design.project_paper_baseline: Topology-aware headline baseline aligned with prior multi-LoRA systems work: serial single-LoRA on one GPU, and independent single-LoRA colocation on multi-GPU.
benchmark_design.single_gpu_reference: Single-GPU grouped-versus-serial baseline intended to mirror paper-style one-GPU PEFT comparisons.
benchmark_design.multi_gpu_local_colocation: Local-only multi-GPU packing benchmark: jobs are sharded across GPUs, and each GPU runs without DDP.
benchmark_design.reference_batch_size_search: Optional fair-eval mode: search for the largest fitting input batch per compared method under the same GPU memory budget.
benchmark_design.headline_guidance: For final speedups, use project_paper_baseline.speedup_vs_primary_baseline. shared_backbone_runtime is the raw launched topology and may not be directly comparable to the paper baseline suite.
benchmark_design.cluster_efficiency: Derived multi-job systems metrics for aggregate throughput, pass makespan, GPU-seconds, per-GPU throughput, per-job baseline completion time, and peak memory. This is the most direct block for the tLoRA/mLoRA-style cluster claim.
benchmark_design.matched_multi_adapter_reference: Same-workload correctness and performance reference against the project's baseline LoRA path when rank and alpha match.

workload.description: 32 equal-rank adapters across repeated instruction-tuning task families, designed to stress high-concurrency shared-backbone throughput.

shared_backbone_runtime.comparison_note: Use this suite to profile the runtime exactly as launched. Do not use it as the headline speedup against paper-style baselines unless the topology and batch-sizing policy also match.

project_paper_baseline.recommended_claim: aggregate throughput and job-turnaround under shared backbone execution

single_gpu_reference.reason: Enable include_baseline_lora and select the workload to run the single-GPU reference suite.

multi_gpu_local_colocation.reason: Enable include_baseline_lora and select the workload to run the local co-location suite.

matched_multi_adapter_reference.reason: Enable include_baseline_lora and select the workload to run the matched multi-adapter reference suite.

workload.description: 32 adapters with repeated mixed-task families and moderate rank skew, designed to stress scheduler quality under high local concurrency.

shared_backbone_runtime.comparison_note: Use this suite to profile the runtime exactly as launched. Do not use it as the headline speedup against paper-style baselines unless the topology and batch-sizing policy also match.

project_paper_baseline.recommended_claim: aggregate throughput and job-turnaround under shared backbone execution

single_gpu_reference.reason: Enable include_baseline_lora and select the workload to run the single-GPU reference suite.

multi_gpu_local_colocation.reason: Enable include_baseline_lora and select the workload to run the local co-location suite.

matched_multi_adapter_reference.reason: Enable include_baseline_lora and select the workload to run the matched multi-adapter reference suite.
